summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Skroutz Price Calculator v2 including Product List table, reverse calculation, and Excel export. All 30 backend API tests passed (100%) and all frontend UI tests passed. New features verified: /api/products/all (588 products alphabetically), /api/reverse-calculate (profit from custom price), /api/bulk-calculate (multi-product), /api/export-excel (file download), Product table with inline calculations, and navigation.

issues: Minor: Console warning about HTML nesting (span inside tbody) - not affecting functionality, just a React hydration warning

seed_data_creation: Data was pre-loaded: 589 report_listed products, 588 FBS products in database.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests extended to cover all new endpoints. Product UID 6841355 (Natural Doctor Complete D3) is good for testing: MP 8.6%, FBS fee 0.59€. FBS price for cost=10, profit=0.90, vat=24% is 16.11€. Reverse profit formula verified: real_profit = final_price - final_price*mp% - final_price*(1-1/(1+vat%)) - fbs_fee - packaging - wholesale. Export Excel downloads skroutz_pricing.xlsx.

features_verified.GET /api/products/all: Returns 588 products sorted by ASCII (Latin chars first, then Greek)
features_verified.POST /api/reverse-calculate: Correctly calculates profit from custom final price (tested positive +3.70€ and negative -2.06€)
features_verified.POST /api/bulk-calculate: Calculates prices for multiple products, skips non-existent ones
features_verified.Product List page /products: Loads with 588 products, table has all required columns
features_verified.Table columns: Product name, EAN, MP%, FBS€, Wholesale input, FBS Price, Custom Price, Profit - all present
features_verified.Wholesale input calculation: Real-time FBS price calculation (10€ wholesale → 16.11€ FBS price)
features_verified.Custom override profit: Reverse-calculated profit shown (green +3.70€ for 20€, red -2.06€ for 12€)
features_verified.Export Excel button: Works and downloads file with toast confirmation
features_verified.Filter/search: Filters by name, EAN, UID correctly
features_verified.Quick Calculator: Calculates FBS 16.22€ and MP 15.66€ for 10€ wholesale using averages
